projects.name: LexScaffold / LingoEase
description: Built a full-stack teacher-facing web application end-to-end: discovery, design, development, deployment, and user handover.
Built a RAG pipeline (Python, FAISS, OpenAI API) with a transparent, user-controlled frontend that educators can use to inspect and adjust outputs independently.
Designed around non-technical user needs with a focus on accessibility, usability, and reliability in production.
Evaluated outcomes using established NLP metrics (FKGL, FRE, semantic similarity); communicated findings to academic and non-technical stakeholders.

projects.name: LLM Product Content Generator
projects.description: Integrated LLM-based AI features into a production SilverStripe e-commerce site — designed, built, tested, and deployed the full feature pipeline. Reduced manual content authoring time through targeted prompt engineering and a modular automation pipeline.

projects.name: Clinical NLP Pipeline
projects.description: Built and optimised natural language query systems for data retrieval and analysis at The Clinician. Designed AI-driven pipelines that transformed unstructured clinical datasets into structured formats, integrating cloud-based services for scalable processing.

bullets: Delivered end-to-end client web projects using JavaScript/TypeScript across SilverStripe, CraftCMS, and WordPress CMS platforms.
Integrated LLM-based AI features into a production SilverStripe e-commerce site — designed, built, tested, and deployed the full feature pipeline.
Improved website performance and maintainability through modular architecture, automation tooling, and pragmatic design decisions balancing delivery speed with long-term scalability.
Collaborated closely with designers and stakeholders to shape requirements and guide technical trade-offs through to delivery.
Built and optimised natural language query systems for data retrieval and analysis.
Reduced processing time through AI-driven pipelines, transforming unstructured datasets into structured formats.
Designed scalable AI workflows, integrating cloud-based services for efficient processing.
Implemented and deployed features across multiple security-based web applications from concept through to production deployment.
Built and deployed scalable data pipelines to process and analyse large security datasets.
Worked with cloud environments including AWS, Docker, and Kubernetes to ensure efficient and reliable application deployment.
Collaborated with QA and UX teams throughout the product lifecycle, assessing technical feasibility and resolving defects.
